name: car-deals-aggregator-mcp
description: An MCP server that aggregates car deals from Cars.com, Autotrader, KBB, CarMax, and Carvana. Direct JSON/GraphQL APIs with Puppeteer fallback; flexible filters (only zip required).

scripts.test: node -e "const { scrapeCarscom } = require('./src/scraper.js'); scrapeCarscom({ make: 'Toyota', model: 'Camry' }, 3).then(r => r.forEach(l => console.log(l.format())))"

author: Rajesh Kodali
